chat.pageSubtitle: Plan, analyze, and propose auditable patches with the agents.
chat.heading: Execution-focused chat
chat.description: A cleaner interface for talking to the agents, without the dashboard visual.
chat.noTasksPrompt: Send an instruction in the chat to generate an executable backlog.
chat.messagePlaceholder: Describe the change you want to make...
chat.initialPlanMessage: Initial plan created for the goal: {{goal}}

timeline.idleHint: Send a message to start a run and follow its stages here.

errors.createSession: Could not create a new session.

executionConsole.title: Side panel
executionConsole.descriptionBusy: Showing the latest activity, derived commands, and recorded output.
executionConsole.descriptionIdle: Once there is activity, the executed history appears here in chronological order.
executionConsole.emptyState: No commands or output recorded for this session yet.

plans.pageSubtitle: Editable execution plan with per-step approval gates.
plans.needsApproval: Approve at least one step to execute
plans.empty: Enter a session id to load its plan.
plans.emptySteps: No steps in this plan yet. Add one to get started.

errors.loadPlan: Could not load the plan for that session.
errors.addStep: Could not add a new step.
errors.executePlan: Could not execute the approved steps.
